data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for external-to-internal entity link mapping.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'External-to-internal entity link mapping'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that demonstrate this mapping functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but without concrete evidence or tests confirming its implementation, the validation cannot be completed.
gaps: No evidence of external-to-internal entity link mapping.
